dataset_generation.decision_needed: resolved: final refactor starts from output/EHRNoteQA_processed.jsonl; raw preprocessing remains provenance only
dataset_generation.selected_output_schema: jsonl records from existing EHRNoteQA_processed artifact; downstream code preserves relative output/folds and output/step* folder structure
dataset_generation.selected_metric_or_label_definition: not applicable for dataset start point

zeroshot_generation.decision_needed: resolved: use shared Step 8 script for BioMistral, Qwen2.5, Qwen3, DeepSeek, and Llama3; BioMistral remains the start/reference model
zeroshot_generation.selected_output_schema: output/step8/<model>/fold_<k>/<condition>_generated.csv with shared columns idx, patient_id, fold_id, question, ground_truth, model_answer, model, method, retrieval_sim_score, prompt_length, answer_length
zeroshot_generation.selected_metric_or_label_definition: generation only; correctness is assigned later by selected judge
zeroshot_generation.shared_script_policy: all five models use the same Step 8 generator; model differences are confined to MODEL_CONFIGS chat template, token budget, thinking-output cleanup, retrieval index source, and BioMistral validated system prompt
zeroshot_generation.smoke_check_status: existing Step 8 BioMistral zeroshot generated/evaluated files present for all 5 folds; not a direct reproduction of old Step2/Stage1 answers
zeroshot_generation.final_stage8_temperature_policy: Use temperature 0.0 for Stage 8 generation/evaluation reruns, except multirun and regen/self-correction experiments.

llm_judge_biomistral.decision_needed: resolved: use old Stage 1 GPT-4o binary judge prompt/data construction with temperature 0.1 for open-ended answer judging
llm_judge_biomistral.selected_prompt_system: You are a medical expert evaluating an AI model's answer to a clinical question.
llm_judge_biomistral.selected_metric_or_label_definition: binary_correct: 1 if GPT-4o returns 1 only; 0 if response contains 0; otherwise None/excluded or retried
llm_judge_biomistral.calibration_baseline: Sara/Jose A∩B N=112 human agreement subset, provisional for prompt confirmation
evidence: refactor/pre_atom_pipeline/reports/GPT_JUDGE_OLD_PROMPT_PROVENANCE.md: exact old prompt/data T=0.1 matched old GPT record 97/100 on Caitlin overlap
llm_judge_biomistral.selected_ground_truth_format: choice text only, no answer letter
llm_judge_biomistral.stage8_final_policy_note: For Stage 8 reruns use deterministic T=0 where applicable; old Stage 1 GPT judge provenance remains T=0.1 for reproducing old GPT record.

human_judge_biomistral.raw_human_export: not retained in archive; only the resolved human gold + GPT-4o label are kept
human_judge_biomistral.selected_output_schema: patient_id, question, ground_truth, model_answer, sara, jose, human_gold, gpt_4o_label, agree
human_judge_biomistral.selected_metric_or_label_definition: human_gold = Sara==Jose unanimous (Answer Quality == 5 -> 1; else 0); gpt_4o_label = Stage-1 binary GPT-4o judge
human_judge_biomistral.calibration_baseline: data/ground_truth/calibration_100.csv: 100 sampled (seed 78) from the Sara/Jose A∩B unanimous N=112 pool; full-112 GPT-vs-gold agreement is 91.1% and this 100-subsample is 94% (see provenance)

candidate_policies: A_intersection_B human agreement subset for judge validation
majority human label where >=2 raters exist
validated GPT-4o labels for full scale
ground_truth_selection.human_baseline_policy: Sara/Jose A∩B unanimous N=112 pool; 100 sampled (seed 78); human gold + GPT-4o label retained for the calibration baseline

icl_tests.decision_needed: final ICL condition set and which pilot conditions remain historical

multirun_self_correction.selected_detection_working_default: F1 free-form detection plus GPT-4o validity gate
multirun_self_correction.selected_correction_working_baseline: regen plus count-compare verdict; correction variants still require validation
multirun_self_correction.selected_verdict_working_default: v1f free-form pairwise contradiction count, Qwen3-32B extraction, ties keep original
correction_variants_to_validate: span-guided correction with R2 multi-query retrieval
1-shot correction from audited high-confidence fix examples
best-of-3 correction candidates with verdict selection
multirun_self_correction.few_shot_policy: do not reuse BioMistral contrast pool as-is; use only audited high-confidence fold-safe examples
multirun_self_correction.pilot_recommendation: 100-150 balanced items on DeepSeek and Qwen2.5 first; optionally add Qwen3 or Llama
multirun_self_correction.temperature_policy: Exception to Stage 8 T=0 rule: multirun and regen/self-correction keep their separately validated settings.

retrieval_augment.historical_best_stage8: gtr_note_pos_k1: GTR-T5 note-similarity, k=1 positive QA example
retrieval_augment.newer_scorer_quality_best: multi-component score using question + note + ground-truth/answer-alignment components
retrieval_augment.correction_retrieval_best: Step9 R2 multi-query embedding + agreement scoring, top-5 note spans
retrieval_augment.caveat: newer retrieval-quality gains have not yet translated into stable RA-ICL downstream accuracy gains
